rationale: Author-of-record lens: 68c87106 delivers exactly Bead 1 / R9, no more no less. The three changed files equal Bead 1's key_file_paths precisely (OWNERSHIP.yaml, ownership_wave2_test.go, architecture.md), +43 lines. Step 1: `- .claude/workflows/**` added adjacent to `.claude/skills/**` (right after line 21), correctly NOT over-claiming `plugins/mindspec/workflows/**` (already covered by the `plugins/mindspec/**` glob) — matches the plan's non-redundancy directive verbatim. Step 2: `TestWorkflowOwnsClaudeWorkflows` appended, reusing the existing `repoRootForWorkflowManifest(t)` helper (walks to the live committed manifest, so it is non-vacuous — removing the claim fails it), calling `attributeDomain(nil, root, "", ".claude/workflows/ms-panel.js", []string{"workflow"})` and asserting `("workflow", non-nil Ownership, nil err)` — structurally identical to sibling `TestWorkflowOwnsTraceAndGolangci`, exactly as the plan prescribes. Step 3: architecture.md doc-sync region appended after the spec-108 wave-2 section, accurately recording the ADR-0036 same-diff-or-earlier lineage. Verified: `go test -run TestWorkflowOwnsClaudeWorkflows$` PASS, `go build ./...` green. Per BRIEF, the missing 110/112 architecture sections are branch-base expected and not flagged. Zero deviation from the plan.
findings: OWNERSHIP claim placed exactly adjacent to `.claude/skills/**`, both `.claude/**` sub-tree claims grouped as the plan directs; no over/under-claim.
Attribution test mirrors the sibling shape exactly and is falsifiable via the live-manifest helper; not vacuous.
architecture.md doc-sync accurately describes the ADR-0036 same-diff-or-earlier invariant and the `plugins/mindspec/**`-already-covers reasoning.
Diff = Bead 1's three key_file_paths, no scope creep.
